MINI MINUTES: JPT Toni Young; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dhieren Gadariya is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Samuel Sample is present.
Attorney Doris Chan appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505B, for settlement discussions. Trial date is continued to July 14, 2014 for settlement protective date granted by JPT Toni Young. Notice is waived by both parties. (D501/JPT)
